feature_description: No step-free access to/from the Waterloo & City line from Monday 13 April until mid-May.
Lifts are owned and maintained by Network Rail; check Journey Planner for current status.
No step-free access until Friday 27 March.
No step-free access to/from the eastbound Piccadilly line on Monday 1 June.
Both lifts that serve the footbridge will be out of service until spring 2026.
No step-free access to the southbound Southern Railway platform.
No lift service between the street and ticket hall until autumn 2026, but step-free access is available via the Bridge Road entrance/exit.
No step-free access to/from platform 1 until April 2026.
No step-free access until further notice.
